anywhere.description: Date the mark was first used anywhere (any jurisdiction).

in_maine.description: Date the mark was first used in Maine by applicant or predecessor.

predecessor_name_and_address.description: Predecessor-in-business name and address when first-use-in-Maine was by a predecessor (not the applicant directly).

line1.description: Word(s) of the mark to be registered (two-line free-form input).

line2.description: Word(s) of the mark to be registered (two-line free-form input).

line1.description: Description of the design features (logo, stylization) of the mark (two-line free-form input). 'If none, so indicate.'

line2.description: Description of the design features (logo, stylization) of the mark (two-line free-form input). 'If none, so indicate.'

type_and_class_number.description: Combined type-of-mark (trademark/service mark/collective mark) and class number from MARK-5. Class number determines per-class fee tier.

line1.description: Description of the goods manufactured or sold and/or services provided under the mark (two-line free-form input).

line2.description: Description of the goods manufactured or sold and/or services provided under the mark (two-line free-form input).

line1.description: Description of how the mark is used (applied to goods, used to promote sale, used in connection with services).

line2.description: Description of how the mark is used (applied to goods, used to promote sale, used in connection with services).

additional_pages_attached.description: Boolean opt-in indicating additional pages are attached for any of the multi-line fields.

printed_name_and_capacity.description: Printed name and capacity of the person signing the mark application. For individuals, capacity is typically 'Myself'; for entities, capacity is the signer's officer/role title.

entity_name.description: Applicant's identity as it should appear on the registered mark — 'Myself' for individuals, or firm/association/corporate name for entities.

mailing_address.description: Applicant's mailing address (single combined widget on this form).

entity_type.description: Mutually-exclusive enum of applicant's legal form: 'individual' | 'general_partnership' | 'limited_partnership' | 'corporation' | 'association' | 'union' | 'other' (with explanation).

jurisdiction_of_organization.description: Home jurisdiction (state) of the applicant entity. Required when applicant.entity_type is corporation, LLC, LP, LLP, or other registered entity type.

date_of_organization.description: Date applicant entity was incorporated/organized in its home jurisdiction.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
